tutorial-force-directed-task1.description: Locate the alter (i.e., non ego-node) with the largest number of neighbors.
tutorial-force-directed-task1.instruction:
# Task 1
Locate the alter (i.e., non ego-node) with the largest number of neighbors.
## How to answer
 Click on the alter to select the answer.

tutorial-force-directed-task2.description: Identify the shortest path between two non-ego alters.
tutorial-force-directed-task2.instruction:
# Task 2
Identify the shortest path between two non-ego alters.
## How to answer
 Enter the number of edges of the path between those two nodes below.

response.prompt: Identify the shortest path between two non-ego alters

tutorial-force-directed-task3.description: Which alter is closest to the ego (i.e., which edge between ego and 1-ater has the largest edge weight)
tutorial-force-directed-task3.instruction:
# Task 3
Which alter is closest to the ego (i.e., which edge between ego and 1-ater has the largest edge weight)
## How to answer
 Click on the alter to select the answer.

tutorial-force-directed-task4.description: Estimate/Count the number of alters in alter level k.
tutorial-force-directed-task4.instruction:
# Task 4
Estimate/Count the number of alters in alter level k.
## How to answer
 Enter the number below.

response.prompt: Estimate/Count the number of alters in alter level k.

tutorial-force-directed-task5.description: Estimate the number of intra-k-alter edges.
tutorial-force-directed-task5.instruction:
# Task 5
Estimate the number of intra-k-alter edges.
## How to answer
 Enter the number below.

response.prompt: Estimate the number of intra-k-alter edges.

tutorial-force-directed-task6.description: Given two alters, identify their common neighbors.
tutorial-force-directed-task6.instruction:
# Task 6
Given two alters, identify their common neighbors.
## How to answer
 Click on the nodes to select them

tutorial-force-directed-task7.description: Which alter level is the largest?
tutorial-force-directed-task7.instruction:
# Task 7
Which alter level is the largest?
## How to answer
 Enter the number below.

response.prompt: Which alter level is the largest?

tutorial-force-directed-task8.description: Follow the path p from node v to node u.
tutorial-force-directed-task8.instruction:
# Task 8
Follow the path p from node v to node u.
## How to answer
 Click on all nodes on the path
